title: Student job board — sample listings
lead: Fictitious roles for layout and planning conversations only. Pay bands are illustrative, not offers or averages.
disclaimer: Always follow your visa work conditions and institution workload expectations. This board does not list real employers.

listings.title: Weekend checkout — large format grocer
listings.detail: Early Saturday opens; closed-toe shoes mandatory. Roster drops fortnightly.

listings.title: Evening floor — neighbourhood bistro
listings.detail: Peak is Thu–Sat; good for conversation English practice, hard on assignment weeks.

listings.title: Library shelver — campus casual pool
listings.detail: Quiet shifts around exams; hiring often opens week three of semester.

listings.title: Bike delivery — metro inner ring
listings.detail: Rain gear and phone mount essential; track kilometres for tax diary habit.

listings.title: Pop-up events staff — stadium gigs
listings.detail: Irregular bursts around concerts—great for savings spikes, risky during assignment crunch.

listings.title: Tech shop — sales assistant (evenings)
listings.detail: Product training provided; KPIs for attachments—ask about quiet study days before signing.

zones.label: Sustainable band
zones.hint: Room for sleep, meals, and a social pulse.

zones.label: Tight but common
zones.hint: Batch cooking, calendar blocks, and saying no to extra shifts protect grades.

zones.label: Burnout risk
zones.hint: Shorten one axis—usually paid hours—before assessments stack.
